title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 21.557 - Personnel and actuarial assistance authorized — compensation, how paid
text:
21.557.  Personnel and actuarial assistance authorized — compensation, how paid. — The committee may employ such personnel and actuarial assistance as it deems necessary to carry out its duties and prepare required reports.  The compensation of such personnel and the expenses of the committee shall be paid from moneys appropriated to the committee or from the joint contingent fund as approved.
(L. 1983 S.B. 393 § 3, A.L. 2014 H.B. 1882)
